## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Surge AI's brand narrative, Forbes article strategy, and website development plans.](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Forbes article narrative needs shaping; team exploring ways to influence story direction](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [New website content planned: "How We Work" page and expanded About section](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Brand pillars document well-received; team to review and finalize](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [GrowthX team to take lead on website design, pending mood board review](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)

## Topics

### Forbes Article Strategy

  - [Current narrative likely "shy AI founder, bootstrapped startup"](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Desire to shift towards "new AI powerhouse, brilliant scientist-founder"](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Actions to influence:](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Potentially announce open-sourcing of search functionality](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
      - [Identify pre-Surge contacts for interviews (e.g., Xing at Databricks)](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
      - [Prep interviewees with specific talking points (TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Brand Narrative Development

  - [Focus on showing work and demonstrating value publicly](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Plans to create "How We Work" page, similar to Markor Guides](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Aim: arm audience with questions that highlight Surge AI's strengths vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Team to review and finalize brand pillars document](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

### Website and Content Strategy

  - [New blog post ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [GrowthX team to take over website design from Sean](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Planned content:](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Expanded About page](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - ["How We Work" section](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Potentially more public-facing research and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Team Collaboration

  - [GrowthX team to lead design efforts, pending mood board review](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Emphasis on efficiency in execution and decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to review and provide feedback on brand pillars document](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)

  - [GrowthX to create mood board for website design](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Develop talking points for Forbes article interviewees](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

  - [Schedule follow-up on Forbes article strategy and website development](https://fathom.video/share/CNaxSnj9edBsDqGGyhqJgG_knympboAd?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
